title: RRY7
summary: RRY7 or Real Rider Y 7-Spoke is a line of Hot Wheels Wheel Types introduced in 2026. The wheel features a seven-spoked design mimicking that of certain European sports cars. Category:Wheel Types

title: Mario Kart
summary:
200px|right
The Mario Kart series features a variety of Super Mario characters in a variety of karts, with plastic driver figures. Playsets that mimic the video game tracks are also available, as well as 4-packs and a glider series.

title: Leo Hot Wheels
summary:
200px|right
To overcome tight foreign trade regulations in India, Mattel partnered with an Indian marketing company Blow Plast Inc. in a joint venture to create 'Leo Mattel'. With Blow Plast Inc.

title: Hot Wheels Infinite Rush
summary: Hot Wheels Infinite Rush is an upcoming 2026 racing game from the developers behind Hot Wheels Unleashed & Hot Wheels Unleashed 2: Turbocharged. Developed and published by Milestone S.r.l., the game is set to be released on 10 September 2026, for the Xbox Series X/S, PlayStation 5, Nintendo Switch 2 and Microsoft Windows.

title: 2005 Showcase Hot Wheels
summary: This is a list of the 2005 Showcase Hot Wheels Series, sometimes called 'Oil Cans'. This was a series which used the '100%' Hot Wheels castings and packaged them in an individual acrylic case. They came in themed sub-series' consisting of 4 cars each.

200px|right

title: Legends
summary:
400px|
Legends are a sub line of Hot Wheels in the late 90s specifically for the adult collector. As part of the 100% series, these 1/64 casting where issued with much more detail than the regular line-up. Starting in 1996 these sets usually came in sets of 4 cars.

title: Legends: Barris Kustom 4-Car Set
summary:
center|800px
In 1998, Hot Wheels commemorated the Legendary custom car shop: Barris Kustoms. Four castings were included based on real-life 'Barris Kustom' vehicles.
